title: Implementation Plan
description: Validates the content of an implementation-plan artifact. Matches the plan skill's write-plan output structure. Allows additional properties so different skills can extend the base structure.

title.description: Human-readable title for the implementation plan.

summary.description: Brief summary of what the plan accomplishes.

key-changes.description: List of key changes the plan introduces.

test-strategy.description: How the implementation will be tested.
